h97d75f37gf28cg499cgab46g55e0396c6a3f: My blood is cleansed, my muscles still.
h02aa9d85g732bg4e9dgba74g857b4f15f773: I have even been shown new might - to tug foe and fiend into reach. Damn it all.
hb090c7e1ga8a9g4cb1gbad2g5ed501890061: *Your gazes meet, and memories of last night's dream course through you.*
h00aece69ge506g4304g93b1gcc47dcda8dde: First, the tadpole sickens you. Next, it entices you with a cure.
h2503aaedg06e8g444bg9192g8c89ba18f3da: That you refused it tells me you've more courage than I considered.
heef7fc2eg7a11g44b7gbf31g684a8bb23755: No. The dream - you neither succumbed nor resisted. Is this your way, then - to meet conflict with silence?
h75a2390bg0186g4db2g8be8g61a0e00ce080: You cannot escape the tapole's grip forever. First, it sickens you. Next, it entices you with a cure.
ha35bcacag23a8g4709g8417g9a30a71ee2f1: If you do not see the ruse, you are already lost.
hc457cdbeg7fe2g4c40g968bge051e16c9f45: How does a child of Vlaakith still not understand? Your mind is not your own.
h039443b4g8a53g4bd5ga3ddg2efb5c6a78ff: Do you not yet understand? Your mind is not your own.
h0fd4a530g82c3g44ecgb6d6g31bbe5c358ad: First, the tadpole sickens you. Next, it entices you with a cure. If you do not see the ruse, you are already lost.
h4af74f93gda5ag4b9agb21bgbf721f9fa05d: Come now. It was just a dream.
hfecea78cg6396g47c6gbd1fged4c979bec6d: Stay out of my head. My dreams are private matters.
h4165c31eg2651g4273g9218g6cea05759de7: Stop overreacting. It was just a dream, nothing more.
h6c98f88cg8b54g4aa4g892cg1578a137d4dc: It was not 'just a dream.' I quickly knew mine for the poison it was.
h2da50a2cg7a82g4cf5gb913g9349b2510cf3: You're saying what I felt was some sort of mind flayer trick?
ha429ff0dg7c19g46e2g9847g0d7036af8ed3: Yes. I dreamt as well, and knew it for the poison it was.
h19a52f3fg2f46g4b10g8ae5g22b0097bef00: The ghaik will lead you to fire, and convince you it's honey. You will gorge yourself even as it burns.
h9f596256g3bb9g4a64gafafga331786961ba: It will call to you again. You must always resist.
h2b644a4bg58ecg4076g8ec0g24e8906de0e0: *A strange sensation courses through you, and your companion's mind unfolds, secrets half-revealed.*
h295a8aabgfc6bg4e88g9eb7g3e18f5d160ca: Try to connect with her. Who had she seen in her dream?
h9f771978g21d2g4fc4gb995g31bf2a94ffe2: *A shiver runs across your mind... you feel sated.*
hda83ef8dg225eg456cgaa22gaa8e053b4dc2: *Your minds connect, and you drown in Lae'zel's deep longing. You see a githyanki woman, pale as death, her face contorted by desire. Vlaakith.*
h3b1c0371gee90g4875g9a63g66399a5f8d36: *Your minds connect, and you drown in Lae'zel's deep longing. You see a githyanki woman, pale as death, her face contorted by desire. She is a lich.*
hb720778dgfa2fg4a66g9d55ge2828d0ba2a4: *Your minds connect, and you drown in Lae'zel's deep longing. You see a githyanki woman, pale as death, her face contorted by desire.*
h2ed31c62gba9eg4fcdgbeb8gee00bc042b38: You felt temptation too, didn't you?
h81d211e5gf3b2g45c7gbdb9g65de33fd6b67: G'lyck. You are right to. It was Vlaakith that came to me. My own Queen.
h90476d89g1a15g4473g9819g404b16246722: A lich - how foul is your mind that such a creature appears to you?
h68534868g5918g4e80g8509g4518d16e8ebc: You dreamt of a woman turned gaunt in undeath. A lich.
he87e37fcg7266g4fa1gb3c8g9cd131e46441: By home and hearth, what foul woman is this that infests your dreams?
h13e36687g0cc6g4f1cga53cg694b5828a539: You dreamt of a gith woman - she looked undead. I saw it for myself.
hc7c8a3deg852ag4612ga160ga1012b4245d2: G'lyck. You entered my mind. As I'd expect - after all, I entered yours.
h797be819g0940g45ffgb657g5a3300b41725: It was Vlaakith that came to me. My own Queen.
h6cf9f06egede6g48e5ga755g250898820be4: I am no stranger to wanting. My life is defined by what I've yet to possess.
hbb88be93g6af5g4eedg8233gcce50c1ce623: I do not yet call the Astral Sea home. I do not yet bathe in my Queen's blessing.
he263b4c0g1f6cg44b7gaf8bg8c6cae01d9fe: She said only one word while I dreamt. 'Chyrki' - 'Come to me.'
hf25208b8gc49dg48a3g8557gbd2910323eec: I know it was ghaik deception. Would that the lie not smell so fragrant.
hc22ab41eg1a05g4299gb5e9ga9c621677544: You dreamt of our lich Queen, Vlaakith. I saw it for myself.
h671990efg391cg40cdg96d7g6d1565f4d777: As I'd expect. After all - I entered yours.
h25e00b41gec05g4cf5g948agf5fefb7b2321: *Something stirs deep within you, hungry and alert... it's taking something you'll never get back.*
hd76761c4g3241g45b6ga82agca57741cba49: *Your mind lurches, reeling suddenly as if... bitten.*
hfb5fe876g5accg474agbc76ge1bec10db38c: *A shadow swims across your vision, and a familiar voice tells you to be calm. You are loved.*
hfb6c5170g6500g4ec2g8872gf124d09731b0: *Your blood runs quicker, feeding the gnawing absence at the centre of your mind.*
h746b4447g973eg4032g9846g532b2caaad81: *The presence deep in your mind is awake, unblinking. This is it. A single word pervades your consciousness: 'Soon'.*
h7a514286g705ag4263gabb3g5e60cbb5e84f: *Your mind is full, bursting with ecstasy and terror. Finally, it is coming. You are becoming.*
hea1b3f04g6974g499dg8bf0ga69f38e33e90: Try to connect with her. Who had she seen in her dream?
hcb3858bege317g47e5gb925ge16026a70a22: When I have something to tell, I will tell it.
h1c16e869g1571g4e23gbbbdg0b3136682bce: Draw on the power within to enforce your will.
hd02e9ffcgb90fg4633g9ca0g18eef46ab8c2: *You focus on the source of the power, but it is quiet and still. It needs to rest.*

h91a361b2g62feg48baga0dbg2b73c24baf63: I'll keep your advice in mind.
h2f9bb5afg3daeg40cdg8802gc7a677074925: I do not give advice. I give instructions.
h6f0ccb85ge23ag446fg96aag5263918a64a0: I'll do as I wish. You have no say in the matter.
hcd6555f7g9ef5g4d5dg837eg7759ca66cb7f: Then your brain will be pulp before the tenday passes.
hd168f1cegf433g48e3gb5b5gd444ee289c89: What are the mind flayers after, if not to turn us?
ha6b6fadeg806eg4f65g8fa7g18b802afe572: I don't know, to put it plainly.
h268462f4g0b79g44eag98a2g9a17df2332a3: The question commands my every waking moment. At a crèche, these answers may await.
h5c76370cgb4e6g4686g81b5g37395abad194: What about your dream? Tell me more.
h8f2bc8d3g7c39g45f6g9f39gbc48e62e2842: Very well. Your resistance proved your integrity.
h192b39e0g6b5eg4b5ega94fg55626ecc01ce: It was Vlaakith that came to me. Our beloved Queen.
hc215f661gb472g4132g89fagdeb44e7aff4a: It was Vlaakith that came to me. My own Queen.
h56854a41gdbc2g40bbga37bg10dc4fd6acc1: What about your dream? Tell me more.
h9d94976dg2b73g422ega989g7029a75f2ec6: Resisting temptation is not among my virtues.
hfaaed31bg419fg4901g85f5g881a95109120: Then make it one, or your brain will be pulp before the tenday passes.
h75f0df78ga018g4322g96e2g6383490cbdf8: Don't worry - I have the situation under control.
hd039d34dgaaa9g446agb2d5g9da075e6aa03: Let us hope so - or your brain will be pulp before the tenday passes.

h13b3196ag0564g49d1g80ffg82ad95f1bc73: Your god allows the parasite in your head to fester. No god can help you.

h989ad992gf4b1g4b60g9098g43d1b2f10215: My loyalty is to the queen. I will not succumb to ghaik trickery.

hbc34c33bg1ab0g4e28gb8aeg117317835908: The ghaik own your mind. Until you are purified, no matters are private.
